name: GrapheneOS

pricing.details: Free and open source Android-based operating system focused on privacy and security hardening.

description: Hardened Android-based operating system with a strong focus on security and privacy, featuring aggressive app sandboxing, hardened memory allocator, verified boot, and reduced attack surface compared to standard Android builds.
rationale: GrapheneOS is a security-focused Android distribution designed to significantly reduce attack surface while maintaining compatibility with the Android app ecosystem. It strengthens app isolation, hardens memory handling, and enforces verified boot. Unlike general-purpose Linux distributions, it is not a desktop OS and is not intended for traditional workstation use. It does not provide anonymity features or network routing; instead it focuses on device-level security hardening. It is best suited for users who want a secure daily-driver mobile OS without relying on OEM Android builds.
